name: Fruit Coctail Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the fruit and reserve 1/3 cup of syrup. Chop the fruit and set aside.
2. Cream together butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Beat in egg and vanilla.
3. In a separate bowl, whisk together flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. Gradually stir in the reserved syrup and cherry juice to the butter mixture, alternating with the dry ingredients.
5. Mix in the chopped fruit, coconut, and cherries until evenly distributed.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 9 x 9 x 2-inch baking pan.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 to 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow to cool completely before cutting into bars, if desired. Dust with powdered sugar on top, if desired.
